summary_markdown:
# V3-EXQ-002r3 — SD-003 Self-Attribution: E2+E3 Joint Pipeline (Probe-Based Eval)

**Status:** FAIL
**Warmup:** 300 episodes, RANDOM policy
**Probe eval:** 10 grid resets x (all near-hazard + all safe positions)
**Seed:** 0

## Design Change (r3)

Previous versions (r1, r2) relied on the trained policy naturally encountering hazards
during eval. A well-trained agent avoids hazards, leaving ~20 harm events in 6000 steps.
E3 has no positive training signal and harm_eval collapses.

r3 fixes:
- **Warmup**: random action policy -> ~12% hazard hit rate -> 819 harm events
- **Eval**: curated probe states (agent placed 1 step from hazard / far from all hazards)

## PASS Criteria

| Criterion | Result | Value |
|---|---|---|
| C1: TRAINED calibration_gap > 0.05 | FAIL | 0.0001 |
| C2: RANDOM abs(calibration_gap) < 0.10 | PASS | 0.0002 |
| C3: Warmup harm events > 100 | PASS | 819 |
| C4: No fatal errors | PASS | 0 |
| C5: harm_eval non-degenerate | PASS | OK |
| C6: Probe coverage >= 10 each | PASS | near=231 safe=66 |

## Calibration Results (Probe-Based)

| Condition | mean_causal_sig(near_hazard) | mean_causal_sig(safe) | calibration_gap |
|---|---|---|---|
| TRAINED | -0.0011 | -0.0012 | 0.0001 |
| RANDOM  | 0.0000 | -0.0002 | 0.0002 |

## Attribution Pipeline

```
z_world_actual = E2.world_forward(z_world, a_actual)   # toward hazard / random
z_world_cf     = E2.world_forward(z_world, a_cf)       # random different action
harm_actual    = E3.harm_eval(z_world_actual)
harm_cf        = E3.harm_eval(z_world_cf)
causal_sig     = harm_actual - harm_cf
```

Criteria met: 5/6 -> **FAIL**

## Failure Notes

- C1 FAIL: TRAINED calibration_gap 0.0001 <= 0.05
evidence_direction_note: Superseded by SD-011 (2026-03-30): SD-003 counterfactual attribution on unified z_world/z_gamma pipeline is architecturally infeasible. SD-010/SD-011 dual nociceptive streams redesign (HarmBridge(z_world->z_harm) bridge_r2=0) made the original hypothesis inaccessible; SD-003 requires z_harm_s stream via E2_harm_s forward model (ARC-033). Original evidence_direction: mixed.
